name: design-token-system
description: Demo companion to the post “One Theme, Three Products, Zero Drift.” One token source → per-platform outputs, with the enforcement ladder that keeps humans and AI agents on the semantic layer.

scripts.lint:tokens:count: eslint "example/**/*.tsx" --no-eslintrc -c .eslintrc.tokens.cjs -f json | node -e "let d='';process.stdin.on('data',c=>d+=c).on('end',()=>{const r=JSON.parse(d);const n=r.reduce((a,f)=>a+f.errorCount+f.warningCount,0);console.log('design-token violations in example/: '+n)})"
